response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performer Ayunda Risu throughout the video. 2. Detected two songs based on lyrics and audio shifts: 'FLY HIGH!!' (BURNOUT SYNDROMES) and 'MIR//or' (Ayunda Risu). 3. Mapped scenes based on the distinct musical and visual transition occurring at 04:02. 4. Searched for official/verified lyrics for 'FLY HIGH!!' (using original composer BURNOUT SYNDROMES) and 'MIR//or' (using performer/original artist Ayunda Risu). 5. Compiled the full lyrics, cleaned formatting, and structured the JSON response as required.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Ayunda Risu performing a cover of the song 'FLY HIGH!!' by BURNOUT SYNDROMES followed by a performance of her original song 'MIR//or'. The visuals depict her riding a dragon in the sky and then fighting in a giant squirrel suit.

scenes.description: Ayunda Risu sings 'FLY HIGH!!' while riding a dragon through the sky. The lyrics match the BURNOUT SYNDROMES song.

scenes.description: The scene shifts as Ayunda Risu begins performing her original song 'MIR//or' while in a giant squirrel costume, interacting with a burning environment.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
If I love you, would you love me too
Utara ku kecil dahulu
The love will last, it will
Selamanya ku kan peduli, right?
Through me (to me)
Broken thing have I become
And you see, life is pain (love is paradise)
Truly I just never had enough
Ordinary day it seems

Titik hujan menyegarkan (membasahi) segala
Bunga-bunga emosi manusia (luka-luka emosi manusia)
Mekar dan berkembang (terlelap) megah selamanya

Utara mu lebih dahulu
The love will last, it will
Selamanya ku kan ada di sini
To me
Enchanting have I become
And you see, life is fair (love is a façade)

Ordinary day it seems
The cloud of lies (ordinary) in the sky
Painted color in my (never meant for me) paradise
Titik hujan menghapuskan (membasahi) segala
